title: Showbak #7731
definition:
Shobach = "expansion"

 1) general of king Hadarezer of the Syrians of Zoba in the time of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shobach = "expansion"

 1) general of king Hadarezer of the Syrians of Zoba in the time of David

    NASB:  an Aramean (Syrian) general, the same as 7780
